name: OWASP ASVS 5.0
description: ASVS 5.0 provides an updated application security verification baseline for requirement-driven design, development, and testing.

requirements.name: Define testable security requirement baseline
requirements.description: Establish controls, verification, and remediation loop for define testable security requirement baseline.
requirements.verification: Review evidence, testing, and remediation records for ASVS5-1

applicability.subject: Application development and security testing teams
